title: campanula cashmeriana
intro: Campanula cashmeriana, also known as Kashmir bellflower, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Campanula cashmeriana can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses.
